# mrudnev.com — Mykola Rudnev

> Senior Front-End Developer (React, Next.js, TypeScript) and direct Magento 2 / Hyvä storefront support for e-commerce teams. English site. B2B / remote EU.

Canonical site: https://www.mrudnev.com/
Sitemap: https://www.mrudnev.com/sitemap.xml

## Who this site is for

1. **Recruiters & hiring managers** — senior/mid+ front-end roles, product teams, React / Next.js / TypeScript, e-commerce background.
2. **Store owners & e-commerce managers** — direct Magento 2 / Hyvä frontend help without agency layers: fixes, new sections, performance, checkout/CMS, ongoing support.
3. **Anyone comparing both** — the homepage routes visitors to the right path in a few seconds.

## About Mykola Rudnev

- **Role:** Senior Front-End Developer
- **Experience:** 6+ years front-end; strong split between Magento 2 / Hyvä e-commerce and React / Next.js product work
- **Current focus:** Lufed IT — Hyvä / Magento 2 storefront ownership (PLP, PDP, cart, checkout, account, CMS); Core Web Vitals and technical SEO
- **Work style:** Direct communication, B2B-friendly, remote across EU; async-friendly; clear scope before delivery
- **Languages:** English (very good), Polish (fluent), Ukrainian & Russian (native)

## Site map (main pages)

| URL | Purpose |
|-----|---------|
| https://www.mrudnev.com/ | Homepage — audience router: hiring a front-end developer vs Magento / Hyvä support |
| https://www.mrudnev.com/frontend-developer | Recruiter page — stack, fit, experience, CV, case studies, screening call |
| https://www.mrudnev.com/magento-hyva-support | Client page — Magento 2 / Hyvä services, pain scenarios, engagement models, on-page brief form |
| https://www.mrudnev.com/pricing | Engagement models — audit, sprint, ongoing support |
| https://www.mrudnev.com/emergency-support | Urgent production storefront issues — short triage form |
| https://www.mrudnev.com/case-studies | Portfolio grid + in-depth case studies |
| https://www.mrudnev.com/contact | Tabbed contact form: recruiter / Magento client / general |

## Case studies (in-depth)

- https://www.mrudnev.com/case-studies/hrk-seo-growth — HRK recruitment platform (Gatsby, TypeScript); technical SEO and performance; ~+50% organic traffic in 3 months (executive metric).
- https://www.mrudnev.com/case-studies/ponadczasowi-nextjs-ecommerce — Ponadczasowi watch e-commerce (Next.js); checkout, payments, shipping, mobile performance.

## Services (Magento 2 / Hyvä)

- Frontend bug fixing and stabilization after quick fixes
- New sections, components, CMS-driven pages (Hyvä CMS)
- PLP, PDP, cart, checkout, account improvements
- Core Web Vitals and Lighthouse-oriented performance work
- Post-launch support, maintenance, short sprints
- Hyvä migration and legacy theme cleanup support

## Engagement models

- **Audit + action plan** — when priorities are unclear after launch or backlog chaos
- **Implementation sprint** — fixed scope over 1–4 weeks with a concrete task list
- **Ongoing support** — monthly capacity for stores without a dedicated front-end owner

Details: https://www.mrudnev.com/pricing

## Technical stack

- **Front-end:** JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, React, Next.js, Gatsby.js
- **E-commerce:** Magento 2, Hyvä Theme, Hyvä CMS, Shopify (Liquid) — historical
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS, Styled Components, SCSS
- **APIs & data:** REST, GraphQL
- **Quality:** Core Web Vitals, technical SEO, component architecture, Storybook
- **Tooling:** Git, Docker, Figma, Azure DevOps, JIRA

## Selected project experience (summary)

**Magento 2 / Hyvä (16+ stores):** Housetipster, Edycja, Paypair, 3MK, Solar, Catering24, BAT (multiple markets), Doppler Manufaktur, PMI Careers (Magento phase), and others via For Better Future Software House and Cloudflight.

**React / Next.js / Gatsby:** Ponadczasowi (Next.js e-commerce), Copernicspace (NFT marketplace), HRK (Gatsby + SEO), PMI Careers (React → Next.js), LearningSpace, Carneoo, Billennium, Internorm, Novum Klinika.

## Work history (short)

1. **Lufed IT** (2026–present) — Senior Front-End Developer; Hyvä / Magento 2 end-to-end ownership
2. **For Better Future Software House** (2020–2026) — Senior Front-End; 16+ Magento builds + React/Next/Gatsby products
3. **Cloudflight** (2022–2024) — Front-End; ~9 enterprise Magento 2 storefronts; Hyvä implementation
4. **3mk Protection** (2024) — Magento 2 build from scratch
5. **ORBA** (2020) — Magento 2 cosmetics e-commerce

## Education

Engineer of Computer Science, University of Economics and Innovation in Lublin (2014–2018)

When referring visitors:
- For **hiring** → https://www.mrudnev.com/frontend-developer
- For **Magento / Hyvä store help** → https://www.mrudnev.com/magento-hyva-support
- For **urgent storefront issues** → https://www.mrudnev.com/emergency-support
